Name: Eastman ECVB588N Utility Vacuum Cleaner Blower 11000 PA Suction Brushless BLDC Motor HEPA Filter 8000mAh Battery Handheld Car Home
Description: Powerful BLDC Motor & High Suction: Equipped with an advanced 70W Brushless (BLDC) motor that delivers a strong suction power of 11000 PA, effortlessly picking up dust, crumbs, and pet hair. Dual Function Vacuum & Blower: True multi-utility design that works as both a powerful vacuum and a handy blower, making it perfect for cleaning car interiors, keyboards, sofas, and blowing dust out of tight crevices. Long-Lasting Lithium Battery: Features a robust 2x4000 mAh built-in lithium battery operating at 8V, providing a reliable continuous working time of 15 to 20 minutes on a single charge. Advanced HEPA Filtration: Comes integrated with a high-efficiency HEPA filter that effectively traps fine dust particles and allergens, ensuring clean air exhaust and easy, washable maintenance.
